rules: Passing one definition does not imply another definition passed.
Every mandatory source reference must be causally available.
Availability is the maximum mandatory source availability.
Definitions create descriptive research objects only.
No definition may create a trade signal, execution instruction, profitability label or preferred interpretation.

pa_candle_anatomy.degenerate_rule: zero_range is stored with ratio features null and degenerate flag true

pa_body_engulfing.pass_rule: current.body_lower <= previous.body_lower and current.body_upper >= previous.body_upper and current.body > 0

pa_directional_body_engulfing.pass_rule: pa_body_engulfing passed and current.direction is opposite previous.direction and neither direction is neutral

pa_pin_bar_like.pass_rule: not degenerate and dominant_wick_to_range >= 0.60 and body_to_range <= 0.30 and opposite_wick_to_range <= 0.15
pa_pin_bar_like.direction_rule: lower dominant wick -> bullish_rejection_shape; upper dominant wick -> bearish_rejection_shape

pa_rejection_close.pass_rule: not degenerate and rejection_wick_to_range >= 0.50 and close is in opposite outer 0.25 of range
pa_rejection_close.direction_rule: lower rejection wick -> bullish_rejection_shape; upper rejection wick -> bearish_rejection_shape

pa_context_linked_rejection.pass_rule: pattern range overlaps upstream object or minimum distance <= max(one verified price increment, 0.05 ATR)

pa_breakout_exact.pass_rule: bullish: close > upper boundary; bearish: close < lower boundary

pa_breakout_point_buffer.pass_rule: bullish: close >= upper boundary + one increment; bearish: close <= lower boundary - one increment

pa_breakout_atr_buffer.pass_rule: bullish: close >= upper boundary + 0.10 ATR; bearish: close <= lower boundary - 0.10 ATR

pa_failed_breakout.pass_rule: later close returns through the same locked boundary into the prior range or zone
pa_failed_breakout.ordering_rule: later bar close_time and availability_time are strictly greater than breakout availability

pa_retest.pass_rule: after at least one non-overlap bar, a later bar overlaps the broken boundary or its original locked buffer band

pa_structural_pullback.pass_rule: counter-directional leg becomes available while referenced Group3 protected structure has no already-available invalidation
pa_structural_pullback.availability: max(group3 state availability, group6 leg availability)
pa_structural_pullback.invalidation_rule: referenced protected structure invalidates or upstream structure direction changes

pa_continuation_after_pullback.pass_rule: later validated displacement availability is after pullback availability and protected structure remains valid
pa_continuation_after_pullback.invalidation_rule: protected structure invalidation or later opposite Group3 structural transition

pa_exhaustion_failed_breakout.pass_rule: failed breakout and rejection pattern refer to the same boundary interaction and direction
pa_exhaustion_failed_breakout.invalidation_rule: later valid close-through breakout of the same locked boundary

dow_advancing_structure.pass_rule: exact upstream Group3 state is bullish or advancing according to frozen adapter

dow_declining_structure.pass_rule: exact upstream Group3 state is bearish or declining according to frozen adapter

mandatory_inputs: group3 range, neutral, transition or ambiguous structure state
dow_indeterminate_structure.pass_rule: exact upstream Group3 state matches frozen indeterminate adapter values

mandatory_inputs: group3 bullish CHOCH or MSS event
dow_bullish_transition.pass_rule: event type and direction are exact frozen upstream values
dow_bullish_transition.invalidation_rule: later bearish structural transition or protected bullish structure invalidation

mandatory_inputs: group3 bearish CHOCH or MSS event
dow_bearish_transition.pass_rule: event type and direction are exact frozen upstream values
dow_bearish_transition.invalidation_rule: later bullish structural transition or protected bearish structure invalidation

dow_protected_pullback.pass_rule: both interpretations reference the same Group3 state or protected structure identity

mandatory_inputs: causally available Group4 bounded range or paired support/resistance context
Group3 indeterminate or range structure context
wyckoff_range_context.pass_rule: both upstream contexts overlap in symbol, timeframe and causal time scope

mandatory_inputs: Group5 downside sweep or stop-run of range low
causal reclaim or pa_failed_breakout back inside range
wyckoff_spring_candidate.pass_rule: all evidence references the same lower range boundary and is directionally consistent
wyckoff_spring_candidate.invalidation_rule: later exact close-through below the same range low after hypothesis availability

mandatory_inputs: Group5 upside sweep or stop-run of range high
causal reclaim or pa_failed_breakout back inside range
wyckoff_upthrust_candidate.pass_rule: all evidence references the same upper range boundary and is directionally consistent
wyckoff_upthrust_candidate.invalidation_rule: later exact close-through above the same range high after hypothesis availability

wyckoff_sign_of_strength.pass_rule: displacement and breakout share direction, timeframe context and boundary sequence
wyckoff_sign_of_strength.invalidation_rule: later pa_failed_breakout of the same range high

wyckoff_sign_of_weakness.pass_rule: displacement and breakout share direction, timeframe context and boundary sequence
wyckoff_sign_of_weakness.invalidation_rule: later pa_failed_breakout of the same range low

mandatory_inputs: later bullish pa_retest of broken range high
wyckoff_last_point_of_support.pass_rule: retest closes on or above breakout side and no failed breakout is already available
wyckoff_last_point_of_support.invalidation_rule: later failed breakout below the same range high

mandatory_inputs: later bearish pa_retest of broken range low
wyckoff_last_point_of_supply.pass_rule: retest closes on or below breakout side and no failed breakout is already available
wyckoff_last_point_of_supply.invalidation_rule: later failed breakout above the same range low

wyckoff_accumulation_hypothesis.pass_rule: spring availability precedes sign-of-strength availability within the same immutable range context

wyckoff_distribution_hypothesis.pass_rule: upthrust availability precedes sign-of-weakness availability within the same immutable range context

mandatory_inputs: causally prior dow_advancing_structure or bullish Group2 regime
wyckoff_reaccumulation_hypothesis.pass_rule: prior advancing context availability precedes range-context availability

mandatory_inputs: causally prior dow_declining_structure or bearish Group2 regime
wyckoff_redistribution_hypothesis.pass_rule: prior declining context availability precedes range-context availability

mandatory_inputs: Group5 sweep, reclaim or stop-run evidence
Group6 validated displacement leg linked by explicit Group6 evidence
ict_liquidity_sweep_displacement.pass_rule: Group6 evidence chain references the exact Group5 source ID and the displacement direction is consistent with the post-sweep delivery interpretation

ict_mss_fvg_delivery.pass_rule: Group6 evidence and FVG association reference the same displacement leg and exact Group3 event ID

mandatory_inputs: frozen causally available dealing-range lower and upper references
ict_premium_discount_context.pass_rule: range upper > range lower; close < midpoint -> discount, close > midpoint -> premium, exact equality -> equilibrium

mandatory_inputs: Group6 FVG, BPR, void, CE or inversion object
later causal lifecycle touch or visit
ict_return_to_imbalance.pass_rule: lifecycle record references the exact Group6 object ID and occurs strictly after object availability

mandatory_inputs: Group7 definition candidate, match or institutional zone
its exact Group6 source leg or evidence chain
ict_block_delivery_context.pass_rule: Group7 stored source IDs and relations prove the connection; no preferred definition is selected

mandatory_inputs: explicit Group5 draw-on-liquidity or target-liquidity object
ict_draw_on_liquidity_context.pass_rule: exact Group5 object is available and its direction/location relation to Group3 context can be stored without predicting future reach
